summary: Completed F0-E Multi-Entity Finance testing: per-entity scoping, incentive→GL accrual, RBAC, and GL isolation. Backend tests show 97.4% success rate (38/39 passed). Frontend partially tested - app loads without errors, Entity Switcher visible, but full navigation testing incomplete due to browser automation limitations.

minor_bugs.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - actual endpoint is /api/gl/journal (not journal-entries)
minor_bugs.impact: Test script used wrong endpoint path, actual functionality works

navigation_issues.component: Navigation to Manager Dashboard and CRM
navigation_issues.issue: Browser automation could not reliably navigate to Manager Dashboard and Sales Force views due to dynamic navigation structure
navigation_issues.impact: Testing incomplete - manual verification or improved selectors needed
navigation_issues.note: App loads successfully, Entity Switcher visible, no console errors. Navigation structure is Indonesian-language based (ANALITIK (BI), PENJUALAN, Pelanggan)

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: All 6 report endpoints accept entity_id param (ent_ksc, ent_kanda, all)
✅ Backend: CRITICAL INVARIANT - orders_today: ksc(3) + kanda(1) = 4 == all(4)
✅ Backend: CRITICAL INVARIANT - monthly_revenue: ksc(42775000) + kanda(36550000) = 79325000 == all(79325000)
✅ Backend: Incentive→GL accrual already posted for ent_ksc period 2026-06 (amount=665000.62, journal=KSC/JE-00013)
✅ Backend: Idempotency check PASSED (created=false on second POST)
✅ Backend: Trial balance BALANCED for ent_ksc (debit=credit=79845750.62)
✅ Backend: Incentive accounts present in trial balance (6-5000 Beban Insentif, 2-1500 Hutang Insentif)
✅ Backend: RBAC - Sales role gets 403 on POST /sales/incentive/post-gl
✅ Backend: RBAC - entity_id=all gets 400 on incentive endpoints
✅ Backend: GL per-entity isolation - both ent_ksc and ent_kanda books separately balanced
✅ Backend: CoA is shared (37 accounts accessible without entity filter)
✅ Frontend: Entity Switcher visible and functional (shows 'Semua Entitas')
✅ Frontend: No console errors or red error screens
✅ Frontend: Indonesian language UI working correctly
✅ Frontend: Login working for admin, manager, and sales roles

success_percentage.frontend: Partial - app loads successfully, core UI elements present, full navigation testing incomplete

notes: All CRITICAL backend functionality verified and working:
- Per-entity scoping with additive invariant (ksc + kanda == all) ✅
- GL per-entity isolation with balanced books ✅
